rows.notes: README and STATUS should both describe the locked checkpoint plus current H19 and preserved H17/H15/H14/H13/V1 state.
Publication record docs should expose the taxonomy-labeled controls and historical references explicitly.
The repo should expose one active-driver document plus one explicit planning-state taxonomy.
The short release summary and paper bundle status should both point to the same locked checkpoint.
Submission-candidate criteria should define a real bundle-lock gate on the same frozen scope.
The release-candidate checklist should keep outward sync downstream of the locked bundle and standing audits.
Reopen control should force later agents into one named patch lane and a refreeze step.
The layout decision log should record the current governance choices explicitly.
